note: Hand-entered DC one-off events. Add specific dated events here (e.g. from posters/flyers or curated holiday programming). Each entry needs a stable id, real lat/lon, and ISO local startDateTime / endDateTime with the Eastern offset. Past events are filtered automatically by the pipeline.

events.title: A Capitol Fourth 2026: Free Independence Day Concert & Fireworks at the U.S. Capitol, Washington DC
events.description: Celebrate America's 250th at A Capitol Fourth 2026, the free Independence Day concert on the West Lawn of the U.S. Capitol in Washington, DC. Bring the whole family for the National Symphony Orchestra, star performers, and a live fireworks finale. Grounds open in the afternoon and the concert begins at 8 p.m. - no tickets required.

events.title: Falls Church Civic Jam 2026: Free All-Ages July 4th Weekend Community Festival
events.description: Kick off July 4th weekend 2026 at Falls Church's free Civic Jam, an all-ages community festival at Cherry Hill Park. Families can enjoy live music, all-age inflatable games, local food vendors, and friendly summer games celebrating the Little City and America's 250th. Runs Friday evening, July 3, from 6 to 10 p.m.

events.title: National Independence Day Parade 2026: Free July 4th Parade on Constitution Avenue, Washington DC
events.description: Watch the National Independence Day Parade 2026 march along Constitution Avenue in Washington, DC on July 4th. This free, family-favorite parade features marching bands, military units, floats, and patriotic performers celebrating America's 250th birthday. The procession steps off at 10:30 a.m.

events.title: National Archives July 4th 2026: Free Declaration of Independence Reading Ceremony, Washington DC
events.description: Join the National Archives July 4th, 2026 celebration on Constitution Avenue, where the Declaration of Independence is read aloud by costumed historical reenactors. This free, family-friendly Independence Day ceremony marks America's 250th anniversary with the Founding Fathers, music, and festive activities. The reading ceremony runs from 10 to 11 a.m.

events.title: Salute to America 2026: Free July 4th Fireworks on the National Mall, Washington DC
events.description: Cap off July 4th, 2026 with the free Salute to America fireworks over the National Mall in Washington, DC. Families gather on the Washington Monument grounds for the nation's largest Independence Day fireworks display, marking America's 250th birthday. The fireworks show begins around 10:30 p.m.

events.title: Palisades 60th Annual Fourth of July Parade 2026: Free Neighborhood July 4th Parade, Washington DC
events.description: The Palisades 60th Annual Fourth of July Parade returns to MacArthur Boulevard NW in Washington, DC on July 4th, 2026. This beloved free neighborhood parade brings families together for floats, bikes, music, and post-parade fun at the Palisades Recreation Center. The parade steps off at 11 a.m.

events.title: Rockville Independence Day Celebration 2026: Free July 4th Festival & Fireworks at Stepanek Park
events.description: Celebrate Independence Day 2026 in Rockville, MD with a free family festival and fireworks at Mattie J.T. Stepanek Park on July 4th. Enjoy live music starting at 7 p.m. before a 20-minute fireworks finale lights up the sky at 9:15 p.m. Bring blankets and chairs for this all-ages July 4th celebration.

events.title: Smithsonian Folklife Festival 2026: Free All-Ages National Mall Festival (July 4th Weekend), Washington DC
events.description: Explore living cultural traditions at the free 2026 Smithsonian Folklife Festival on the National Mall in Washington, DC, running through July 12. Families can enjoy performances, hands-on workshops, craft demonstrations, and an exhibition at the historic Arts and Industries Building as part of America's 250th celebration. A perfect free, all-ages outing for July 4th weekend.

events.title: Smithsonian Folklife Festival 2026: Free Family Culture Festival on the National Mall, Washington DC
events.description: Spend a summer Sunday at the free 2026 Smithsonian Folklife Festival on the National Mall in Washington, DC. This all-ages celebration of living cultural traditions features music, workshops, craft demonstrations, and an exhibition inside the historic Arts and Industries Building. Free admission makes it a great family outing the weekend before July 4th.

events.title: Gaithersburg SummerFest 2026: Free Family Festival & Fireworks at Bohrer Park
events.description: Gaithersburg SummerFest 2026 lights up Bohrer Park at Summit Hall Farm on Saturday, June 27 with a free, family-friendly festival and fireworks finale. Enjoy live music, food trucks, kids' activities, and a glowing after-party leading up to the fireworks display around 9:20 p.m. A standout kickoff to the July 4th season in Montgomery County.
events.venue: Bohrer Park at Summit Hall Farm
